headline: Abercrombie & Fitch vs. Ulta Beauty: Which Consumer Stock Is a Better Buy in 2026?
summary: Abercrombie & Fitch posts a 6.7% revenue jump, while Ulta Beauty grows nearly 10%, but their risk profiles and valuations tell a deeper story.

headline: How Is Ulta Beauty's Stock Performance Compared to Other Retail Stocks?
summary: Ulta Beauty has considerably underperformed its industry peers recently, yet analysts remain moderately optimistic about the stock’s prospects
